title: AGENTOBS AgentStepPayload
description: RFC-0001 §8.4 — Payload for one iteration of a multi-step agent loop. Used with event type: llm.trace.agent.step. Links into the same span tree via trace_id, span_id, and parent_span_id. step_index is zero-based. Each step is a child span of the root AgentRunPayload span (§8.6).

agent_run_id.description: RFC-0001 §8.4 — Stable identifier for the agent run that this step belongs to. Shared across all steps of the same run; links to AgentRunPayload.agent_run_id.

step_index.description: RFC-0001 §8.4 — Zero-based position of this step within the agent run. The first step is index 0.

span_id.description: RFC-0001 §8.4 — This step's W3C Trace Context-compatible span ID. Exactly 16 lowercase hexadecimal characters.

trace_id.description: RFC-0001 §8.4 — W3C Trace Context-compatible trace ID shared across all spans in this agent run. Exactly 32 lowercase hexadecimal characters.

parent_span_id.description: RFC-0001 §8.4, §8.6 — The span ID of the parent step or root agent span. Used by OTel backends to render the agent span tree.

operation.description: RFC-0001 §8.4, §10.2 — Primary operation type performed in this step.

model.description: RFC-0001 §8.4, §9.2 — Model used in this step, if a model call was made.

token_usage.description: RFC-0001 §8.4, §9.1 — Token consumption for model calls within this step.

cost.description: RFC-0001 §8.4, §9.3 — Cost attribution for this step.

tool_calls.description: RFC-0001 §8.4 — Tool invocations made during this step. REQUIRED; use empty array when no tools were called.

reasoning_steps.description: RFC-0001 §8.4, §8.2 — Chain-of-thought reasoning steps within this agent step. REQUIRED; use empty array when the model does not expose reasoning. Raw content MUST NOT be stored.

decision_points.description: RFC-0001 §8.4, §8.3 — Explicit branching decisions made during this step. REQUIRED; use empty array when no decisions were recorded.

start_time_unix_nano.description: RFC-0001 §8.4 — Step start time as Unix epoch nanoseconds.

end_time_unix_nano.description: RFC-0001 §8.4 — Step end time as Unix epoch nanoseconds. MUST be ≥ start_time_unix_nano.

duration_ms.description: RFC-0001 §8.4 — Step duration in milliseconds. MUST equal (end_time_unix_nano - start_time_unix_nano) / 1_000_000 within ±1 ms.

error.description: RFC-0001 §8.4 — Human-readable error description when status is 'error' or 'timeout'. MUST NOT include PII or secrets.
examples: Tool execution failed: search_documents returned HTTP 503

error_type.description: RFC-0001 §8.4 — Error type or exception class name.
